recommendations.title: Cyrus
recommendations.overview: With John's social life at a standstill and his ex-wife about to get remarried, a down on his luck divorcée finally meets the woman of his dreams, only to discover she has another man in her life - her son. Before long, the two are locked in a battle

recommendations.title: Baghead
recommendations.overview: Four actors go to a cabin in the woods to write, direct, and act in a film that will jump-start their careers. Their idea is a horror film about a man with a bag over his head, but what happens when that man mysteriously shows up?

recommendations.title: Jeff, Who Lives at Home
recommendations.overview: Dispatched from his basement room on an errand for his mother, slacker Jeff might discover his destiny (finally) when he spends the day with his brother as he tracks his possibly adulterous wife.

recommendations.title: Dawn Breaks, Which Is No Small Thing
recommendations.overview: Teodoro, a Spanish engineer working as a professor in the United States, returns to Spain to enjoy a sabbatical year.

recommendations.title: English Vinglish
recommendations.overview: In the United States for the first time, an Indian housewife with a limited command of English turns Manhattan into her personal language school.

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: Reality
recommendations.overview: Augusta, Georgia, United States, June 3, 2017. After running some errands, Reality Winner returns home, where she is approached by two men.

recommendations.title: ThanksKilling
recommendations.overview: A homicidal turkey axes off college kids during Thanksgiving break.

recommendations.title: The Vicious Kind
recommendations.overview: A man tries to warn his brother away from the new girlfriend he brings home during Thanksgiving, but ends up becoming infatuated with her in the process.

recommendations.title: Detroit
recommendations.overview: A police raid in Detroit in 1967 results in one of the largest citizens' uprisings in the history of the United States.
